0110000000000000 0000010101111101 0 -> sum: 0110010101111101, cout: 0

0000110111100001 0100010010000100 0 -> sum: 0101001001100101, cout: 0
1100010011100111 0101100111100110 0 -> sum: 0001111011001101, cout: 1
1110110010110001 1000110001011010 1 -> sum: 0111100100001100, cout: 1
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
